title: ResearchEntry
description: A peer-reviewed running science study indexed for use in OpenRun coaching decisions.

id.description: Unique identifier for this research entry.

title.description: Full title of the paper or study.

doi.description: Digital Object Identifier, without the https://doi.org/ prefix.

url.description: Public URL to full text or abstract.

methodology_quality.description: Study design, from strongest (meta_analysis/rct) to weakest (expert_consensus).

key_findings.description: Bullet-point summary of what the study found.

coaching_applications.description: How these findings translate into OpenRun coaching decisions or algorithm inputs.

tags.description: Searchable topics, e.g. vdot, threshold, periodization, hrv, nutrition, marathon.

added_by.description: GitHub username of the contributor who added this entry.

added_date.description: ISO 8601 date when this entry was added (YYYY-MM-DD).
